ai_coach.headline: No telemetry synced yet today -- fuel for Field/Team demands and log data as it comes in.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No sleep, HRV, RHR, or body battery data has synced this morning, so readiness can't be quantified. Default to standard caution: treat today as a normal Field/Team session unless subjective signals (soreness, energy) say otherwise.
action_plan: Sync watch/HRV/sleep data before training so today's readiness can actually be assessed.
Hit 60% of the 400g carb target (~240g) split across pre- and post-workout meals around the field session.
Drink 3.5-4.0L fluids today, adding +1.0L with full electrolytes given the sprint/team-output demands.
Log the gym/field session in Hevy immediately after so load and PRs stay current.
Keep any HIIT/sprint reps at true maximal velocity -- no grey-zone effort.
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Today's target is 3100 kcal / 215g protein / 400g carbs / 66g fat for Field/Team output -- route ~240g of those carbs into the pre- and post-workout windows, and log meals as you go since nothing is recorded yet.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight data logged yet, so there's nothing to compare against the glide path toward the 83kg target -- log today's weight to keep the trend line current.
risk_flags: Zero telemetry synced (sleep, HRV, RHR, body battery) -- readiness is a blind spot today.
0/4 scheduled gym days logged this week (0% adherence) -- confirm sessions are actually happening or being tracked.

overview.summary: All core metrics -- weight, RHR, HRV, sleep, steps, body battery -- are missing for today, leaving no basis for a data-driven read.
overview.suggestion: Open the tracker app now and force a sync so today's dashboard populates before training starts.

plan.summary: No weight history or glide path points exist yet, so progress toward the 83kg target and phase milestones can't be evaluated.
plan.suggestion: Log today's morning weight to start building the trend line against the glide path.

training.summary: Readiness and load are both unrecorded, and gym adherence sits at 0/4 logged days this week, making it impossible to gauge accumulated fatigue.
training.suggestion: Proceed with today's Field/Team session at planned intensity, but log it in Hevy immediately afterward so tomorrow's call has real data behind it.

gym.summary: No recent gym session data is available, so there's nothing to compare against the current split or PRs.
gym.suggestion: Log the next lifting session in Hevy with working weights so bar-velocity tracking on compound lifts can resume.

sleep.summary: Last night's sleep and the 90-day stress/body-battery trend are both empty, so recovery status is unknown.
